item.title: total_attempts undercounted in --refine path — second _run_retry_loop resets counter
item.intent: Archive metrics must accurately record total developer attempts including all retries before spec refinement
steps: Before the second _run_retry_loop call in the --refine path (line ~2784), save the current total_attempts as prior_attempts
After the refinement _run_retry_loop completes, set total_attempts = prior_attempts + total_attempts (instead of prior_attempts + 1)
This correctly counts: N failed attempts in first loop + M attempts in refinement loop
Verify archive sprints.jsonl records the correct attempts count for --refine sprints
acceptanceCriteria: When --refine triggers and the refinement pass succeeds, total_attempts equals first-loop attempts + refinement-loop attempts
No change to behavior when --refine is not used
